assets.provenance: Original SVG geometry, labels, and composition created for Presentation Planner; no third-party image or protected interface copied.
assets.alt: Field diagram connecting surface, middle, and bottom water zones to observation, presentation choice, and the next test.
assets.responsiveTreatment: Scale the complete 2:1 diagram within the application width; do not crop away a water zone.
assets.performance: SVG, lazy loaded, async decoded, no remote dependency
assets.claimBoundary: Generalized field-decision education; no current-condition, location, access, safety, regulation, or catch claim.
